failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    p.id AS profile_id,
    pub.id AS publication_id,
    pub.url,
    pub.description,
    pub.num_likes
FROM publication pub
JOIN profile p ON pub.profile_id = p.id
WHERE p.username = 'broxadasinistra'
ORDER BY pub.num_likes DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error:
connection failed: connection to server at "::1", port 5433 failed: could not receive data from server: Connection refused
